eco Where homeschooling and online school become one

A learning path
that's Truly theirs

Lychee Learning is an online homeschool where every lesson plan is built around your child's own learning path. Online teaching and learning at home come together as one — and we don't just guide your child. We coach you, the parent, so homeschooling always feels doable, wherever you need a hand.

  • check_circlePersonalized learning plans
  • check_circleParent guidance
  • check_circleReal-time progress tracking
Sign up — no obligation arrow_forward play_circleSee How It Works

groups Trusted by a growing community of families, teachers & students

About Lychee Learning

Learning is personal.
We built it that way.

Every child's journey is different. Lychee Learning brings students, parents, and teachers into one shared space — so no one learns alone.

person

Personalized paths

Every student gets a plan shaped around their strengths, interests, and pace — not a one-size-fits-all curriculum.

hub

Integrations in learning hubs around the world

Lychee connects seamlessly with physical learning hubs in Bali, Sri Lanka, and beyond — blending online flexibility with real-world community.

trending_up

Progress you can see

Real-time tracking that shows growth over time — not just grades, but skills, habits, and milestones that matter.

In Person

Learning Hubs

Real spaces around the world where the Lychee experience comes to life.

How It Works

From sign-up to growing
in three steps

Getting started is a conversation, not a form. The rest unfolds naturally.

forum

Step 1

Get in touch

Tell us about your child and choose the plan that fits your family — at a hub, at home, or fully online.

route

Step 2

We build the route

Our teachers design a personal learning route for your child — shaped together with you, reviewed as they grow.

eco

Step 3

Start growing

Learn, track, celebrate. Every milestone counts, and your whole community can follow along.

Pricing

Simple, honest pricing

Three ways to learn with Lychee. Every one comes with a real teacher who knows your child.

Our flagship

Your child learns at the hub

Learning Hub

$180 / month

One-time installation: $250 free until September

Your child learns at one of our hubs, guided by our teachers. You follow along from home.

  • checkThe full Lychee curriculum
  • checkTwo one-on-one teacher meetings a week
  • checkA personal learning route for your child
  • checkFollow your child's progress from home
  • checkParent guidance for the homework

Hub membership is paid separately at your hub.

Download the brochure download

You teach, we walk beside you

Homeschooling

$220 / month

One-time installation: $250 free until September

You teach at home. A Lychee teacher walks beside you, week after week.

  • checkTwo student–teacher meetings a week
  • checkA personal learning route, set together
  • checkA weekly one-on-one to coach you, the parent
  • checkParent guidance from day one
Download the brochure

Our teachers carry the day

Lychee de Luxe

$950 / month

One-time installation: $250 free until September

A full online school. Our teachers do the heavy lifting; you stay close, without the workload.

  • checkFour teacher sessions a week
  • checkA personal learning route, fully managed
  • checkYour child works independently between sessions
  • checkA weekly one-on-one with you, the parent
